title: List Item
description: Composable list row (title + description + optional leading/trailing). Can be static or interactive.

props.name: interactive
props.description: When true, root is a link/button.

states.name: focus-visible
effects: Show focus ring using semantic border focus token.

states.name: selected
effects: Selected styling not relying on color alone (indicator).

keyboard: If interactive, use <a> or <button> for correct semantics.
Avoid nested interactive elements inside an interactive row.
aria: If selected state exists, consider aria-current="page" for nav or aria-selected for listbox patterns (only if listbox semantics implemented).

must: Row layout must be scannable (title primary, description secondary).
should: Provide consistent alignment for leading/trailing content.
must_not: Do not make non-interactive rows focusable.

token_usage.notes: Use interactive hover background for highlight.
